title: Funeral Policy Product
description:
Is A Banking Product that provides financial coverage to cover funeral and related end-of-life expenses.
A type of insurance or savings arrangement that enables the policyholder or their beneficiaries to receive a predetermined benefit or payout upon death, ensuring that funeral costs and associated expenses are managed without creating financial burden for the family.
Comment:
A Funeral Policy is an insurance product designed to provide financial or service-based support to cover funeral and related expenses following the death of an insured person.
It allows individuals or families to plan and fund funeral costs in advance through regular premium payments. Upon a valid claim, the policy provides a lump sum payout or arranged funeral services, helping beneficiaries manage immediate and logistical expenses associated with the funeral.
